clusters.title: Discovery comments point to a non-existent status command

member_findings.title: Discovery comments point to a non-existent status command
member_findings.impact: The comment says this mirrors `stop`/`status`, but the current CLI modules and registration list do not contain a `status` command. Future maintainers following the comment will search for a non-existent implementation and may misunderstand which discovery behavior is actually being reused.
member_findings.fix: Update the code comment and matching design text to reference only the existing `stop.py` behavior, or add the shared status/discovery helper if that command is intended to exist.
